untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern requires identification of two distinct local minima at approximately the same price level separated by 2-6 weeks with a peak between them. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition (identifying swing lows and the intervening swing high) which cannot be expressed using single-bar or simple moving-average-based indicators. The Donchian breakout approximates the confirmation, but the core pattern detection of two bottoms at same level requires lookback logic beyond available indicators.
